headline: Caterpillar (CAT) Is Up 8.2% After Russell Top 50 Addition And AI Infrastructure Tailwind - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In late June 2026, Caterpillar Inc. was removed from several Russell value and defensive indexes but was added to the Russell Top 50 Index, reflecting a reclassification toward the largest-cap segment of the U.S. equity market. This index reshuffling comes as Caterpillar benefits from strong fundamentals, tariff refunds and its growing role in AI-related infrastructure and data center power. We'll now examine how Caterpillar's addition to the Russell Top 50, amid tariff refunds and AI-linked...

headline: The Dow’s Biggest Stock Is Today’s Biggest Drag
summary: The Dow would be up nearly 500 points if it weren’t for Caterpillar. Instead, the blue-chip index was up just 44 points, or 0.1%. The S&P 500 was flat. The Nasdaq was down 0.3%. Despite what the big three indexes are saying, most stocks were actually doing quite well on Wednesday.

headline: Meta Drives Mag 7 Pop. Chip Wipeout Clobbers Nasdaq.
summary: Meta Platforms led a rally in Magnificent Seven stocks on Wednesday, but the Nasdaq couldn’t overcome a chip stock clobbering. The Nasdaq fell 0.7%. The S&P 500 dropped 0.2%. The Dow fell slightly. Despite the S&P 500's struggles, a majority of stocks actually rose.

headline: Get Paid 11% To Wait For CAT Stock To Go On Sale
summary: Receive an upfront premium that you retain, which serves to lower your net cost basis if the stock is assigned, with the potential to buy the stock at a discount only if its price drops.

headline: Michael Burry’s Short Call Dents Caterpillar’s AI-Fueled Rally
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Caterpillar Inc. stock slid from a record high Wednesday after Michael Burry, made famous in The Big Short for his bets against the US housing market ahead of the 2008 crisis, said he shorted the industrial heavyweight for the first time.
